description.value: Used for rolling in checks which involve force of will, charisma, general intelligence, or intution. Note that if the check is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers.
Used for rolling to hit when fighting in ranged or melee combat, in place of any other skills. Does not use a modifier.
Used for rolling checks involving feats of physicality, including athletics and evasion. Does not use a modifier.
Used for rolling when making checks that require training or finesse. Note: if the task is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers accordingly. Does not use a modifier.
Used for rolling in checks which involve force of will, charisma, general intelligence, or intution. Note that if the check is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers.
Standard Kevlar for your head. No armor penalty.

Generic Excellent Quality Medium Melee Weapon.

+1 to Attack.

Common ammunition often used as a cheap substitute for armor-piercing rounds. Each round contains a soft, reactive core designed to splatter on a target rather than penetrate it. Deals 1d6 damage less than basic ammunition of the same type, but always ablates the target's armor by the listed amount.

A classic, double-barrel shotgun. Hasn't weathered the test of time especially well, but still in demand despite that.

Can only load basic shells. The Boomstick is a standard-quality shotgun with RoF and magazine size of 2. Any turn that both shells are fired, the player only makes one attack roll for both rounds of damage.

information.notes:
Mook Tier - Tier 2/Troublemaker -The low-level gangoons and enforcers that fill Night City's streets, trying to make a name for themselves. Not especially threatening, but they outnumber every other threat in the city 10:1.

Gang-Wide Ability - (Dis)Organized Crime: For every gangster in a scene, there’s a booster waiting somewhere nearby, just hoping for something to smash up. They enter the scene 1d3 rounds after hearing gunfire or being summoned.

Ability - Get Down, Mr. President!: When adjacent to a Slumlord that is about to take damage, the enforcer can opt to knock the Slumlord prone, taking the damage in their stead.

Extra Gear - Choose between an SMG and 60 basic rounds, a Boomstick and 8 basic shells, or 2 medium pistols which can be dual-wielded and 48 acid rounds.

What, you think that 6th Street runs their streets unopposed? No, friend - there’s a veritable army of small time shitbirds infesting the ‘burbs, every one with a couple of cracked gonks paid to fight and die for turf. You’re lucky you’re good at your job or you might end up one of these, eh?
